title: Challenging the Astral mass analyzer - up to 5300 proteins per single-cell at unseen quantitative accuracy to study cellular heterogeneity
description: Single-cell proteomics dataset using Orbitrap Astral mass spectrometer to quantify up to 5,300 proteins per single cell with high accuracy. The dataset includes human pluripotent stem cells (hPSC) and trophectoderm (TE) single-cell proteomics data.

publication.title: Challenging the Astral mass analyzer to quantify up to 5,300 proteins per single cell at unseen accuracy to uncover cellular heterogeneity

notes: Downloaded from PRIDE archive. Main file: JB_hPSC_TE_SC_240k_20Th_40ms_50SPD_noMBR_Report_Peptides_JB_Pivot.tsv (137.85 MB). This is a peptide-level report from Spectronaut analysis of single-cell DIA data.
